title: Breaking News, Latest News and Videos | CNN
meta_description: View the latest news and breaking news today for U.S., world, weather, entertainment, politics and health at CNN.com.
meta_keywords: cnn news, daily news, breaking news, news today, current events
text_content: Breaking News, Latest News and Videos | CNN Russia’s war in Ukraine Anonymity in the art world Flash flooding in Hawaii BTS’ comeback Transforming Paris Aging in the cold What is the 75 Hard challenge? Reuters Cuba plunged into second nationwide blackout in less than a week Analysis Trump aims to end the revolution that Fidel Castro started. Can the US and Cuba strike a deal? Video CNN reporter shows life in Havana under total blackout 1:27 Getty Images, Reuters, AP What’s ahead as Trump threatens to send ICE agents to airports while TSA workers go unpaid during shutdown Video ‘This is going to be a lot worse’: TSA officer says partial shutdown is not sustainable 1:49 Trump gives Iran 48-hour ultimatum to reopen Strait of Hormuz Show all • Live Updates Live Updates Gallo Images/Orbital Horizon/Copernicus Sentinel Data 2025/Getty Images/File • Live Updates Live Updates Live Updates Tehran says it will strike US infrastructure in the region if the president follows through on his threat to attack its power plants • Catch Up Catch Up Catch Up What we know on day 23 of the US and Israel’s war with Iran Both the United States and Israel have threatened to step up their aerial onslaughts against Iran, while an Iranian missile hit a city in southern Israel, injuring dozens. • Analysis Analysis Analysis The war on Iran is in its fourth week. Here’s what to know Three full weeks of the war the US and Israel launched against Iran have shocked the world oil market, pierced a sense of safety in parts of the Middle East, and claimed the lives of US service members and civilians in multiple countries.
